name: “Sol Badguy” from Guilty Gear lol
description:
“c.S > 5H, 665K > jc, j.S > j.H > j.D, CL 623H, WS 214P 66632146H - Sol Badguy

Eh screw it, been doing GFL content too much, figured I’d do something different this time. Like doing a different game that I’m passionate about like Guilty Gear.

(Might be the most accurate Sol Badguy bot yet, I included many many things from the series like his Outrage MK II and his abilities like Volcanic Viper, but I didn't include all, just his iconic ones. And yes this is his Strive variant. I'm not sure if the bot will remember all that. I'm not actually even sure if the bot will even perform any of his specials.)
